hero.eyebrow: Nutrition first fitness for men who want clarity, not pressure.
hero.subheading: Cimientos helps you simplify nutrition, stay consistent, and create a practical foundation for muscle gain, fat loss, and real self-confidence. No confusing plans. No extreme tracking. Just a clear path forward.

footer.copy: A simple fitness foundation system for men who want to build a better body and a more confident life without the overwhelm.

about.heading: Why traditional fitness apps make you quit.
about.subheading: You're not failing because you're lazy. You're failing because the tools and advice weren't designed for someone starting where you are.
about.badge: Trusted by our early users who started their fitness journey from scratch

item-1.description: Scanning barcodes for every single lettuce leaf breeds mental stress and deep anxiety.

item-2.description: Relentless six-pack ads make normal progress feel worthless.

item-3.description: Missing one day triggers alerts that himiliate you into complete paralysis.

item-4.description: Spending 3 hours researching perfect routines without ever lifting a single weight.

item-1.intro: Meals are measured by grams, and estimates from food packages are fine. Each meal is weighed once and saved as a reusable recipe for easy tracking and repeat use.

item-2.description: Designed for introverted or timid guys looking to build confidence and strength from scratch.

item-3.description: A missed day isn't a failure, it's just a normal human break. The tracking recalculates automatically.

item-4.description: Your calorie requirements evolve naturally. Learn how to adjust them based on your own body's feedback with our simple step-by-step guidance.

how-it-works.heading: Three steps to your foundation.
how-it-works.subheading: Real physical transformation doesn't require living in the gym. We help you design your plan to blend into your current lifestyle seamlessly.

step-1.title: Establish Your Baseline
step-1.description: No rigid rules or high pressure. We begin by defining personalized nutrition and exercise guidelines based on your goals, schedule, activity level, and food preferences.

step-2.title: Set Once, Repeat Forever
step-2.description: Since manufacturer labels estimate protein and calories, precise daily weighing is useless. Calculate your favorite staple meals once using standard labels or a scale, and duplicate them with one tap.

step-3.title: Build Self Respect
step-3.description: Watch your physical body change as your self-esteem and clarity improve. Develop healthy consistency that carries over into career, social life, and mindset.

features.heading: Designed for clarity, built to eliminate complexity.
features.subheading: Everything you need to regain control over your nutrition, habits, and self-belief.

feat-1.summarySubtitle: No micro scale pressure. Intuitive daily estimates.
feat-1.mainSubtitle: Say goodbye to stressful scales and hyper-detailed scanning.
feat-1.mainDescription: Cimientos focuses exclusively on what matters: daily calories and protein. We prioritize visual indicators over extreme weighing systems. This is the simple nutrition foundation built for long-term consistency.

mainBullets.0: Custom macro boundaries created around your favorite meals.
mainBullets.1: Quick-log templates for fast tracking on the go.

feat-2.summarySubtitle: Track your actual progress over time and easily reuse previous meals for consistency.
feat-2.mainTitle: Calm weight tracking & short to long term trends.
feat-2.mainSubtitle: Track real physical progress without daily scale anxiety.
feat-2.mainDescription: Daily weight fluctuations can be discouraging. Cimientos helps you stay focused with clear 13, 30, an 90-day progress trends, while smart meal memory lets you save and reuse pre-calculated protein and calorie-focused meals with a single tap.

mainBullets.0: Short, medium, and long-term trend analysis.
mainBullets.1: Instant duplication & reuse of pre-calculated staple meals.

feat-3.summarySubtitle: Straightforward gym & home routines to build strength.
feat-3.mainTitle: Clear workout routines designed for shy guys.
feat-3.mainSubtitle: No complicated gym machines or complex fitness jargon.
feat-3.mainDescription: Going to a busy gym when you feel insecure can be overwhelming. Cimientos' upcoming exercise feature will provide ste-by-step home templates and introductory dumbbell routines. No flashy posing just foundational physical strength.

mainBullets.0: Simplified workout routines to avoid overthinking.
mainBullets.1: Clear progression systems to build strength without confusion.
